actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT
    name,
    SN AS 시리얼번호,
    price,
    expiry_date
FROM products
ORDER BY name, expiry_date;

SELECT
    name AS 상품명,
    stock AS 재고
FROM stock
ORDER BY name;

SELECT 
    name AS `상품명`,
    expiry_date AS `유통기한`,
    COALESCE(DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()), 0) AS `남은 일수`
FROM products;

SELECT 
    name AS `상품명`,
    expiry_date AS `유통기한`,
    COALESCE(DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()), 0) AS `남은 일수`
FROM products;

unpublishedAction.name: checkEvent
addLog

actionConfiguration.body: SELECT name AS 상품명, SN AS 시리얼번호, outbound_date AS 출고일 FROM outbound_history

SELECT
    p.name,
    MIN(p.price) AS price,
    s.stock
FROM products p
JOIN stock s
    ON p.name = s.name
WHERE s.stock > 0
GROUP BY
    p.name,
    s.stock
ORDER BY p.name;
